ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genetic_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic element */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic element */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the genetic element within the construct */,
  "size_bp" INTEGER /* Size of the genetic element in base pairs (bp) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the genetic element (e.g., Promoter, ORF, PolyA_signal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genetic element */,
  "application_notes" TEXT /* Application notes and additional information about the genetic element */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the genetic element */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the genetic element */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the genetic element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constructs" (
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic construct */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic construct */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genetic construct */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the construct */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the construct was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the construct was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the construct (e.g., draft, published, retired) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the construct (e.g., plant biotechnology, gene therapy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("construct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constructs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "construct_elements" (
  "construct_element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construct-element relationship */,
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic construct */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic element */,
  "order_in_construct" INTEGER /* Order of the genetic element within the construct */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the genetic element (e.g., forward, reverse) */,
  "copy_number" INTEGER /* Copy number of the genetic element in the construct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("construct_element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construct_elements_construct_id FOREIGN KEY ("construct_id") REFERENCES constructs ("construct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construct_elements_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES genetic_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic construct used in the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, failed) */,
  "research_question" TEXT /* Research question being addressed by the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_construct_id FOREIGN KEY ("construct_id") REFERENCES constructs ("construct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the result */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion drawn from the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "construct_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construct version */,
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic construct */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the construct */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construct_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construct_versions_construct_id FOREIGN KEY ("construct_id") REFERENCES constructs ("construct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "construct_version_elements" (
  "version_element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construct-version-element relationship */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construct version */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic element */,
  "order_in_construct" INTEGER /* Order of the genetic element within the construct version */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the genetic element (e.g., forward, reverse) */,
  "copy_number" INTEGER /* Copy number of the genetic element in the construct version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construct_version_elements_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES genetic_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construct_version_elements_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES construct_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "construct_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construct usage event */,
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic construct */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the construct was used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the usage */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the usage (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construct_usage_construct_id FOREIGN KEY ("construct_id") REFERENCES constructs ("construct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construct_usage_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "construct_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construct sharing event */,
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic construct */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the construct */,
  "shared_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the construct */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date the construct was shared */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the sharing */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the shared construct (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construct_sharing_construct_id FOREIGN KEY ("construct_id") REFERENCES constructs ("construct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construct_sharing_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construct_sharing_shared_to FOREIGN KEY ("shared_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "construct_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic construct */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construct_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construct_comments_construct_id FOREIGN KEY ("construct_id") REFERENCES constructs ("construct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construct */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read-only, edit, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Permissions_construct_id FOREIGN KEY ("construct_id") REFERENCES constructs ("construct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Institutions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES users ("department")
)
